{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/02-anthropic-vacancies/308-table-of-contents.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "Table of Contents"
tags:
  * anthropic
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. Table of Contents


{quote}1. _The Cowork Discovery and Why It Changes Everything_{quote}

----





h2. Table of Contents

1. _The Cowork Discovery and Why It Changes Everything_
2. _What Cowork Provides That InGit Doesn't Need to Build_
3. _What InGit Provides That Cowork Lacks_
4. _The Symbiotic Architecture_
5. _Four Integration Paths in Order of Accessibility_
6. _Refined InGit Scope with Cowork in Mind_
7. _Practical First Steps This Month_
8. _Implications for Nautilus and OKWF_
9. _Risks and Open Questions_
10. _Strategic Positioning_

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[253-table-of-contents]] (сходство 0.15)
* [[137-table-of-contents]] (сходство 0.13)
* [[211-table-of-contents]] (сходство 0.13)




----

_Смотрите также:_
* [[253-table-of-contents]]
* [[211-table-of-contents]]
* [[137-table-of-contents]]
* [[322-appendix-b-comparison-matrix]]


h2. Упоминается в

* [[309-1-the-cowork-discovery-and-why-it-changes-everythi|1. The Cowork Discovery and Why It Changes Everything]]
* [[310-2-what-cowork-provides-that-ingit-doesn-t-need-to-|2. What Cowork Provides That InGit Doesn't Need to Build]]
* [[311-3-what-ingit-provides-that-cowork-lacks|3. What InGit Provides That Cowork Lacks]]
* [[312-4-the-symbiotic-architecture|4. The Symbiotic Architecture]]
* [[313-5-four-integration-paths-in-order-of-accessibility|5. Four Integration Paths in Order of Accessibility]]
* [[314-6-refined-ingit-scope-with-cowork-in-mind|6. Refined InGit Scope with Cowork in Mind]]
* [[315-7-practical-first-steps-this-month|7. Practical First Steps This Month]]
* [[307-abstract|Abstract]]
* [[321-appendix-a-decision-tree-for-ingit-adopters|Appendix A: Decision Tree for InGit Adopters]]
* [[322-appendix-b-comparison-matrix|Appendix B: Comparison Matrix]]
* [[270-appendix-b-sub-agent-registry-schema-sketch|Appendix B: Sub-Agent Registry Schema (Sketch)]]
* [[149-appendix-b-summary-of-contributions|Appendix B: Summary of Contributions]]
* [[169-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]]
* [[211-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]]
* [[253-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]]
* [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]
* [[CLUSTERS|Кластеры тематически близких файлов]]
* [[326-содержание|Содержание]]
* [[356-твой-workflow|Твой workflow]]
* [[352-что-ты-не-можешь-делать-без-max-approval|Что ты НЕ МОЖЕШЬ делать без Max approval]]
h2. Упоминается в

* [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]


h2. Связанные документы

* [[314-6-refined-ingit-scope-with-cowork-in-mind|6. Refined InGit Scope with Cowork in Mind]] _42%_
* [[309-1-the-cowork-discovery-and-why-it-changes-everythi|1. The Cowork Discovery and Why It Changes Everything]] _37%_
* [[310-2-what-cowork-provides-that-ingit-doesn-t-need-to-|2. What Cowork Provides That InGit Doesn't Need to Build]] _37%_
* [[322-appendix-b-comparison-matrix|Appendix B: Comparison Matrix]] _37%_
* [[311-3-what-ingit-provides-that-cowork-lacks|3. What InGit Provides That Cowork Lacks]] _25%_
* [[312-4-the-symbiotic-architecture|4. The Symbiotic Architecture]] _25%_
* [[307-abstract|Abstract]] _21%_
* [[270-appendix-b-sub-agent-registry-schema-sketch|Appendix B: Sub-Agent Registry Schema (Sketch)]] _17%_
h2. Связанные документы

* [[309-1-the-cowork-discovery-and-why-it-changes-everythi|1. The Cowork Discovery and Why It Changes Everything]] _42%_
* [[326-содержание|Содержание]] _33%_
* [[310-2-what-cowork-provides-that-ingit-doesn-t-need-to-|2. What Cowork Provides That InGit Doesn't Need to Build]] _29%_
* [[311-3-what-ingit-provides-that-cowork-lacks|3. What InGit Provides That Cowork Lacks]] _29%_
* [[314-6-refined-ingit-scope-with-cowork-in-mind|6. Refined InGit Scope with Cowork in Mind]] _29%_
* [[322-appendix-b-comparison-matrix|Appendix B: Comparison Matrix]] _29%_
* [[CLUSTERS|Кластеры тематически близких файлов]] _29%_
* [[137-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]] _25%_
